subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which of the following is not a royal city of Rajasthan?
question_hi: राजस्थान में कौन-सा राजधानी नहीं है।
explanation_en: Alwar is not a royal city of Rajasthan.
explanation_hi: अल्वार राजस्थान में राजधानी नहीं है।

subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Who was the first ruler of Jaipur?
explanation_en: Swai Jai Singh was the first ruler of Jaipur.
explanation_hi: स्वाई जय सिंग Jaipur के पहले मुख्यांकनेवांकें।
